component.name: Draftwell
component.summary: A minimal, local-first Markdown and HTML desktop editor

description.p: Draftwell is a lightweight desktop Markdown and HTML editor built with Tauri 2 and Rust. It opens normal files from anywhere on your computer, keeps each open buffer in an in-memory tab, and saves directly back to the same file. Tabs can contain files from completely unrelated folders; there is no database, vault, workspace, account, bundled Chromium runtime, or proprietary document format.

ul.li: Real file editing — open, edit, and save actual files from your filesystem
Independent tabs — files from any folder coexist without indexing
Live preview with GFM task lists, KaTeX math, tables, and more
Markdown ↔ HTML conversion with MathML round-trip
Customizable accent color, typography, spacing, and toolbar layout
